debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this✝³ : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
this✝² : m / 2 = initPart.length
this✝¹ : m / 2 = finalPart.length
this✝ : m = initPart.length + finalPart.length
len_s_at_least : m ≤ S.length
this : midPart.length ≤ m - 5
c : Fin m → ℕ := sorry
⊢ ∀ (k : Fin m), 2 * m - 2 - v m S k + c k ≤ 2 * m - 5
